extortion.description: lsa-international.com zoominfo.com/c/lsa-international/97928636 With 25 years experience creating well-designed glassware and ceramics, LSA International defines what is desirable in contemporary style. Our extensive collection includes products for the kitchen, for the dining table and for the bathroom, as well as an extensive range of vases; all are practical, beautiful and a delight to use. LSA International's collection is available in many shops throughout the UK, across Europe
